examples: It was the quintessence of an English manor house.
On this occasion he was away from Misselthwaite Manor until afternoon.
We've got to drive five miles across Missel Moor before we get to the Manor.
Sausmarez Manor is thought to be full of ghosts, notably the Nanny of the 28 Children.
The officer was shot dead as he responded to a 999 call at Lismore Manor, Craigavon.
